title: chaenopleura stelligera
intro: Chaenopleura stelligera, also known as the "Red Stelligera", is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. Chaenopleura stelligera is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems, and is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its health benefits.
